items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Expiring temporary grants', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or checks related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for expiring temporary grants but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or validation. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm whether this requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
